programmes.show_name: Tracey Emin: Where Do You Draw the Line? - imagine
programmes.show_description: Artist Tracey Emin talks to Alan Yentob about her life. Contains some strong language.

programmes.show_name: Emin/Munch: Between the Clock and the Bed
programmes.show_description: A look at the affinities between the art of Edvard Munch and Tracey Emin. Contains some strong language.

Wildlife film-maker Martin Dohrn contemplates the end of his career as he turns his lens to the dramatic dance between a million seabirds and a single hunting falcon.

programmes.show_name: Britain's Wild Places: Dancing Cranes of Sweden
programmes.show_description: As the spring sunshine melts the snow and ice on a lake which is a stop-off point for 10,000 migrating cranes, the birds start to do an unforgettable dance.

programmes.show_name: Secrets of Size: Atoms to Supergalaxies
programmes.show_description: 1/2. In this mind-bending film, Jim Al-Khalili explores the universe at its smallest, from tiny insects to living cells and viruses, before finally arriving at the atom.
